tasks.subject: Task 1: Vendor verbatim files from reference repo
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bring over every unchanged file from hollow/dotfiles (zsh scaffolding, helpers, starship.toml) byte-identical from pinned raw URLs.

**Files:** Create zsh/zzinit, zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh, zsh/has, zsh/add, zsh/link, zsh/uri-parse, zsh/.gitignore, starship.toml

**Acceptance Criteria:** 8 files exist non-empty; byte-identical to hollow@main; zsh -n parses all zsh files; starship.toml valid TOML.

**Verify:** for f in zsh/zzinit zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh zsh/has zsh/add zsh/link zsh/uri-parse; do zsh -n "$f" || echo PARSE FAIL $f; done; python3 -c "import tomllib; tomllib.load(open('starship.toml','rb'))" && echo TOML-OK

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/zzinit","zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh","zsh/has","zsh/add","zsh/link","zsh/uri-parse","zsh/.gitignore","starship.toml"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -n on all zsh files; python3 tomllib load starship.toml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["8 files exist non-empty","byte-identical to hollow@main","zsh -n parses","valid TOML"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Write trimmed zsh/.zshrc
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Trimmed subset of reference .zshrc — core scaffold + 4 plugins + brew self-bootstrap, no personal/tool blocks.

**Files:** Create zsh/.zshrc (full content in plan doc Task 2 Step 1)

**Acceptance Criteria:** zsh -n parses exit 0; has brew bootstrap + starship + 4 plugins; no USER_EMAIL/dropped tool blocks; zup trimmed.

**Verify:** zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && echo SYNTAX-OK; grep -c -E 'USER_EMAIL|terraform|fzf|atuin|gcloud' zsh/.zshrc -> 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && echo SYNTAX-OK && grep -c -E 'USER_EMAIL|terraform|fzf|atuin|gcloud' zsh/.zshrc", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zsh -n exit 0","brew bootstrap + starship + 4 plugins","no identity/dropped blocks","zup trimmed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Write the Brewfile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Minimal-but-coherent Brewfile: starship, nerd font, GNU tools from :brew-init, git/gh.

**Files:** Create Brewfile

**Acceptance Criteria:** exactly 11 brews (coreutils, findutils, gawk, gh, git, gnu-sed, gnu-tar, gnu-time, grep, make, starship) + cask font-meslo-lg-nerd-font; brew bundle list parses 12; all gnubin tools present.

**Verify:** brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile | sort | tr '\n' ' '

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Brewfile"], "verifyCommand": "brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile | sort", "acceptanceCriteria": ["11 brews + 1 cask","brew bundle list parses 12","all :brew-init gnubin tools present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Write install.sh
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thin POSIX sh bootstrap: ensure git (Xcode CLT on macOS), clone into ~/.config (handle pre-existing), symlink ~/.zshrc, re-exec interactive zsh.

**Files:** Create install.sh (full content in plan doc Task 4 Step 1)

**Acceptance Criteria:** shellcheck -s sh clean; sh -n exit 0; 3 clone cases handled; symlinks ~/.zshrc; re-execs zsh via /dev/tty; non-Darwin Linux note; executable.

**Verify:** shellcheck -s sh install.sh && sh -n install.sh && echo LINT-OK && test -x install.sh && echo EXECUTABLE

```json:metadata
{"files": ["install.sh"], "verifyCommand": "shellcheck -s sh install.sh && sh -n install.sh && echo LINT-OK && test -x install.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shellcheck clean","sh -n exit 0","3 clone cases","symlinks ~/.zshrc","re-exec zsh via /dev/tty","Linux note","executable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Rewrite README.md for non-technical users
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace placeholder README with jargon-light install instructions + what-you-get / updating / Linux sections.

**Files:** Modify README.md (full content in plan doc Task 5 Step 1)

**Acceptance Criteria:** exact curl|sh one-liner present; single H1; explains 3 steps + slow first launch; no markdownlint errors.

**Verify:** grep -q 'curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/remerge/dotfiles/main/install.sh | sh' README.md && [ "$(grep -c '^# ' README.md)" -eq 1 ] && echo README-OK

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -q curl-one-liner README.md && single H1 check && echo README-OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exact curl|sh one-liner","single H1","3 steps + slow first launch","no markdownlint errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Verify faithful subset and document smoke test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove repo is a faithful stripped subset of hollow/dotfiles (vendored files byte-identical) and record a manual fresh-Mac smoke test.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Requested by the user in conversation. MUST NOT be closed by walking around it or substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently with output captured.

**Files:** Create docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-28-zsh-dotfiles-skeleton-smoketest.md

**Acceptance Criteria:** all 8 vendored files byte-identical to hollow@main via diff; LICENSE unchanged (Apache 2.0); manual smoke-test checklist file exists.

**Verify:** clone hollow/dotfiles to temp, diff the 8 vendored paths -> FAITHFUL-OK no DIFFERS; git log --oneline -- LICENSE shows only initial commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-28-zsh-dotfiles-skeleton-smoketest.md"], "verifyCommand": "diff 8 vendored files vs fresh hollow/dotfiles clone -> FAITHFUL-OK; git log --oneline -- LICENSE", "acceptanceCriteria": ["8 vendored files byte-identical","LICENSE unchanged Apache 2.0","smoke-test checklist file exists"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"]}
```
